incident.title: Nightly agent test — payment latency spike

postmortem.title: Post-Mortem: Nightly agent test — payment latency spike
postmortem.summary: A high severity incident affected payments-service and was handled by payments-team. Estimated resolution time: 45 minutes.
timeline: 04:28 - Incident triggered: Nightly agent test — payment latency spike
04:28 - Triage completed, severity classified as high
postmortem.root_cause: Root cause under investigation for payments-service. See action items.
action_items: Review and tune alerting thresholds for payments-service
Add automated health check for affected code path
Update runbook generic-incident-runbook with lessons learned
Schedule chaos engineering exercise to validate detection
Implement automated rollback trigger for this failure mode
postmortem.compliance_notes: This incident must be logged in the change management system within 1 hour per FFIEC and SOX requirements. Post-mortem review required within 5 business days.
